## Summary

Describe the user-visible or developer-facing change.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:ui` for visual or interaction changes

## Risk review

- [ ] No authentication, token, or account-storage behavior changed
- [ ] No permission, local-file, process, or network boundary changed
- [ ] No private prompts, transcripts, auth files, logs, screenshots, or generated installers are committed
- [ ] Security/privacy documentation is updated when relevant

## User impact

Explain migration needs, compatibility changes, screenshots, and release-note requirements.

## Changelog

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated, or this change does not require a public changelog entry
